caption: A person's hand reaches into a dimly lit, brown-toned compartment, likely inside a vehicle, to manipulate a white plastic rod. The rod rests diagonally across several mechanical components, including a dark, metallic bracket and a larger curved piece of metal. In the background, a white plastic housing with several mounting holes is visible against the brown interior. A dark tool, possibly a wrench or socket, is partially visible beneath the rod. The hand enters the frame from the right, gripping the end of the white rod and sliding it further into the compartment. On the curved metal piece to the right, the word "ADJUSTABLE" is embossed. As the sequence progresses, the hand pushes the rod deeper toward the left, shifting its position relative to the dark metallic bracket and the surrounding structural elements of the compartment.
